name: 16oz Moira Ceramic Mug Black - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your drinkware collection with this Moira Ceramic Mug from Threshold™. This stoneware coffee mug features a ribbed design in black with a glazed finish for elegant style, while a D-shaped handle makes it easy to hold in hand as you sip your favorite beverage. Suitable for serving both hot and cold beverages, it features a microwave- and dishwasher-safe construction for easy reheating and cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
